title: Delete Columns to Make Sorted III
hints: Identify which columns are already sorted vertically across all rows. Deleting a column affects every string equally, so focus on column validity first.
Think of this as finding the longest subsequence of column indices where each chosen column is valid and maintains non-decreasing order for every row relative to the previous chosen column.
Use dynamic programming where the state tracks the longest valid chain of columns ending at a specific index, ensuring row-wise non-decreasing order between adjacent kept columns.
